elements.description: ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 +3.75, ระดับคานหลังคา +6.65 (height chain 0.60 + 3.15 + 2.90 = 6.65)
'ราวกันตก R1 A-23 ดูแบบขยาย' -- 2nd-floor balcony guardrail at upper-left, roughly grid1-2, in front of a recessed balcony opening with a visible balustrade drawn below the door/window
circled '1' tagged opening, upper floor, left side (grid1-2 area balcony door), with arrow marks
window opening tagged hexagon '4', upper floor, right side (grid3-4 area, likely นอน4/ห้องน้ำ3)
circled '1' tagged opening, ground floor, left side (grid1-2 area, main entry door with side-lite panels)
circled '2' tagged opening, ground floor, center-right (near grid2-3)

large diagonally cross-hatched ('X') panel, ground floor, right side (grid3-4 area) -- likely represents the open จอดรถ (carport) opening seen on the ground-floor plan, shown here as a large unglazed/open bay rather than a standard window
'เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC' reveal-line note pointing to the upper-right area of the facade near the roof-beam line

Several small triangle symbols each containing '1', scattered across the facade at various heights (roof edge, upper floor, lower floor) -- not part of the door/window numbering (which uses circles/hexagons per the symbol legend, หน้า03); purpose not confidently identified, same recurring ambiguity seen on sister houses' equivalent elevation sheets.

warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): the bottom dimension chain reads '0.70 | 0.60 | 4.00 | 2.00 | 3.00 | 0.50 | 0.80' with a secondary grouping '1.30 | 9.00 | 1.30' -- matches the master grid's x_lines (1=0.0,2=4.0,3=6.0,4=9.0) plus the 1.30m roof overhangs seen on the roof plan (หน้า08); the sub-split of the 1.30 total into 0.60+0.70 (west) and 0.50+0.80 (east) is printed but the extra 0.70/0.80 beyond the roof overhang is not independently reconciled against any other sheet -- likely represents an additional fascia/eave-edge projection beyond the roof-plan's own overhang line.

This elevation corresponds to compass-slot '1' on the floor plan's 4-way elevation callout bubble (referencing sheet A-07) -- cardinal direction not independently confirmed from this sheet alone, only the sheet-to-slot mapping.

The large diagonally-hatched 'X' panel on the ground floor (right side) most plausibly represents the open carport (จอดรถ) bay seen on the ground-floor plan (หน้า06) rather than a glazed window -- flagged as a notable feature of this elevation, consistent with the carport occupying the grid3-4 area on that plan.
Individual door/window opening-number-to-D/W-schedule cross-match not confidently resolvable at this resolution -- see the door/window expansion sheet (A-13, หน้า15 per this house's index) once read.

The recurring small triangle-'1' markers are a notable point of ambiguity worth flagging for human review since they don't correspond to any symbol documented on the legend page (หน้า03) -- possibly weep holes, downspout markers, or an elevation-specific annotation convention, consistent with the same open question flagged on sister houses' equivalent elevation sheets.
